name: ai-os
description: Portable AI OS — scans any repo and generates optimized GitHub Copilot context, agents, skills, MCP tools, and slash-command prompts

scripts.validate:fast: npm run build && npm run test
scripts.validate:full: npm run build && npm run test && npm run validate
scripts.install:skill-creator: npx -y skills add https://github.com/anthropics/skills --skill skill-creator -g -a github-copilot -y
scripts.install:find-skills: npx -y skills add https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills --skill find-skills -g -a github-copilot -y
scripts.install:skills: npm run install:skill-creator && npm run install:find-skills
